tasks: You are a financial research analyst. Build a Capex project tracker for Reliance Industries Limited (ticker: RELIANCE). Return a single Markdown table with these EXACT columns: Project | Segment | Capex (Rs cr) | Current timeline note | Current status | Latest timing view | Capacity addition. For 'Current status' use one of: Executing, Operational, Planning, Feasibility, Delayed, Uncertain. For 'Latest timing view' use one of: Near-term, Medium-term, Long-term, Unclear. List the major disclosed capex projects across all segments (New Energy, Oil-to-Chemicals, Retail, Digital/Jio, Upstream, etc.). Use the latest publicly disclosed numbers and management commentary. After the table, add a short 'Sources' section with links.
